mapper.sql: su.id id, su.team_name team_name, su.creator_id creator_id, su.admin_id admin_id, su.description description, su.status status, su.audit_status audit_status, su.create_time create_time, su.update_time update_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_team ( team_name, creator_id, admin_id, description, status, audit_status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{team_name}, #{creator_id}, #{admin_id}, #{description}, #{status}, '0', now(), now() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE app_team
team_name = #{team_name}, creator_id = #{creator_id}, admin_id = #{admin_id}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, audit_status = #{audit_status},
update_time = now(),
WHERE id = #{id};
